title: Magic Knife
description:
Adds a magical Dagger that will ""teleport""  you back to spawn by Right clicking
Best used for keep inventory
body:
Ever sick of trying to die, but it doesn't work? Well, you're in luck! This mod adds a Special, Magical Most epic dagger ever that would ""teleport"" you back to your spawn point

(WARNING: Best used with keep inventory, Will damage Armor.)

dont take anything serious here
